name: OnAREthEstablishedIPv6TCPConnection, OnAREthEstablishedIPv4TCPConnection, OnAREthEstablishedTCPConnection
title: OnAREthEstablishedIPv6TCPConnection, OnAREthEstablishedIPv4TCPConnection, OnAREthEstablishedTCPConnection
syntax: void OnAREthEstablishedIPv6TCPConnection(byte localIPv6Address[], dword localPort, byte remoteIPv6Address[], dword remotePort); // form 1
void OnAREthEstablishedIPv4TCPConnection(dword localIPv4Address, dword localPort, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remotePort); // form 2
description: This callback will be called after an incoming or outgoing TCP connection has been established for an IL’s application endpoint

parameters.name: localIPEndpoint
parameters.description: Object of type IP_Endpoint that contains the address/port of the local endpoint.

parameters.name: remoteIPEndpoint
parameters.description: Object of type IP_Endpoint that contains the address/port of the remote endpoint.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
